latest.title: Boop joins Peeko.co.uk
latest.content:
16 Apr 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 6513A
Huddled Group PLC
16 April 2026
This is a Reach announcement and the information contained is not considered to be material or to have a significant impact on management's expectations of the Company's performance.
Huddled Group plc
("Huddled", the "Company" or the "Group")
Boop joins Peeko.co.uk
Huddled Group plc (AIM:HUD),
the circular economy e-commerce group,
is pleased to announce that Boop Beauty has now been fully incorporated into Peeko.co.uk - the 'Surplus Superstore'.
Peeko.co.uk, is the new singular website for of Huddled Group. The transition to the new site saw Discount Dragon rebranded to Peeko.co.uk last week, with Boop Beauty products now available on the site as of this week.
As well as incorporating all the Huddled brands, Peeko, the Surplus Superstore, will, over the coming months, extend its offering beyond groceries, alcohol, health and wellness and beauty to homeware and electronics, helping manufacturers and retailers deal with surplus in an ethical and economical way. In saving surplus from waste, it is able to pass on huge savings to the end consumer, thus saving their pocket as well as the planet.
In addition to the bargains, customers will be able to enjoy next day delivery on all items ordered up to 11pm via the fully tracked Royal Mail 24-hour delivery service.
Martin Higginson, Executive Chairman said:
"The transition to a single Surplus Superstore, 'Peeko', is another major milestone for the company. Over the coming weeks, we will continue to expand our range, working closely with partners, both new and old, to help them find a home for their surplus inventory. Our mission will remain the same, offering amazing value to our customers whilst reducing waste.
"Peeko will, we believe, deliver a simplified website with easy pricing and an evolving range. We aim to develop a single Surplus Superstore, allowing customers to go on a journey of discovery, whilst still bagging a bargain. Ultimately it's all about: Less waste. More value. Smarter shopping."
Enquiries:
For further information please visit www.huddled.com/investors, or contact:
Huddled Group plc
Martin Higginson
Daniel Wortley
investors@huddled.com
Alma Strategic Communications (Financial PR)

Sam Modlin

latest.title: Rebrand to Peeko and Directorate Changes
latest.content:
2 Apr 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 1526Z
Huddled Group PLC
02 April 2026
Huddled Group plc
("Huddled", the "Company" or the "Group")
Rebrand to Peeko and Directorate Changes
Huddled Group plc (AIM:HUD),
the circular economy e-commerce group
is pleased to announce its intention to consolidate all of its existing websites into one single destination store, under the new brand, Peeko, in order to provide customers with more choice and a better service whilst, at the same time, significantly reducing the Company's operating costs.
Discount Dragon, Nutricircle, and Boop Beauty were each acquired and built with a single mission: to solve the problem of surplus stock. Every year, millions of perfectly good products go to waste, not because there's anything wrong with them, but because packaging changes, there is excess production, orders are cancelled, or shelf lives have become unnecessarily short.
Our new site, Peeko, will have the same purpose but bring our offering together into a single unified platform, enabling our extensive combined customer databases to easily gain exposure to our three existing businesses. The new, improved website will allow us to both reduce operational costs with expected annual cost savings of over £500k, but also provide our customers with more choice and a better service.
Having successfully tested next-day delivery for Nutricircle products, which has demonstrated improved customer acquisition and retention, the Group will be rolling this out as the single delivery option across Peeko, with every item ordered up to 11pm being delivered the next day via the Royal Mail Tracked 24-hour service thereby significantly improving customer service.
Already recognised as one of the UK's fastest growing retailers (Huddled Group plc was ranked 3rd in the 2025 Retail Growth Index), the transition to Peeko will see the Company enter a new chapter in its development as an online surplus superstore delivering exceptional value.
The transition to Peeko will begin next week with the rebranding of Discount Dragon. Boop Beauty and Nutricircle will be transitioned into Peeko over the coming weeks.
Over time, the range of products will be broadened, adding to the current range of groceries, alcohol, health and wellness and beauty products. The extended range will allow for better monetisation of the existing audience.
Following the rebranding and migration to a single site, the Company announces that both Michael Ashley and Paul Simpson have stepped down from the Board with immediate effect, with both moving to part-time consultancy positions. We would like to thank Michael and Paul for their service and dedication: Michael for helping us frame our proposition and helping us through the transition to THG Fulfil; and Paul, co-founder of Nutricircle, for his significant contribution to building this business and for his role over the past two years in supporting its integration into the Group following its acquisition in April 2024.
Following Michael and Paul stepping down from the Board, Huddled's Board will now be composed of: Martin Higginson (Executive Chairman), Dan Wortley (Group Finance Director) and Nicholas Lee (Independent Non-Executive Director).
We believe the new single site will allow us to optimise our marketing expenditure, as well as make it easier and more efficient for our channel partners. It will also reduce operational costs, enable next-day delivery and provide a simpler, but broader proposition which, the Directors believe, will help the Company move to group profitability within the coming months.
The Company will make further announcements in due course.
Martin Higginson, Executive Chairman said:
"We have wanted to move to one single site for some time. It not only allows us to streamline our operations but also allows us to improve the customer experience, and offer more choice, as well as next-day delivery on every order. We also believe that the rebranding will make our platform more attractive to additional leading manufacturers and extend the number of partners wanting to work with us.
"We believe that value should feel simple, not complicated. That's why we've developed one unified site focused on clear pricing, honest product information, fast delivery and a constantly evolving range - making it easy for customers to discover something new every time they visit. Less waste. More value. Smarter shopping."
Enquiries:
For further information please visit www.huddled.com/investors, or contact:
Huddled Group plc

Result of General Meeting
Huddled Group plc (AIM:HUD), the circular economy e-commerce group is pleased to confirm that at its General Meeting ("GM") held earlier today, all resolutions were duly passed.
The total number of proxy votes received on each resolution were as follows:

At the GM, inter alia, a resolution was passed which granted the authorities to issue the remaining 5,328,572 Ordinary Shares1 (the "New Ordinary Shares") pursuant to the subscription announced on 10 February 2026.
Admission and Total Voting Rights
Application has been made for the New Ordinary Shares to be admitted to trading on AIM ("Admission"). Admission is expected to take place on or around 12 March 2026. Upon Admission, the New Ordinary Shares will rank pari passu in all respects with the existing Ordinary Shares.
Following Admission and inclusive of indirect holdings, Martin Higginson, a director of the Company, will hold 14.64% of the Ordinary Shares in the Company.
Certain of the Company's shareholders are deemed to be acting in concert in accordance with The Takeover Code ("the Concert Party"). Following Admission, the Concert Party holding will remain unchanged at 46.40% of the Ordinary Shares in the Company.
Following Admission, the total number of Ordinary Shares and voting rights in the Company will be 434,055,717. The Company does not hold any shares in treasury.
The above figure may be used by shareholders in the Company as the denominator for the calculations by which they will determine if they are required to notify their interest in, or a change to their interest in, the share capital of the Company under the FCA's Disclosure and Transparency Rules.

latest.title: Notice of General Meeting
latest.content:
20 Feb 2026 07:00
RNS Number : 7440T
Huddled Group PLC
20 February 2026
20 February 2026
Huddled Group plc
("Huddled", the "Company" or the "Group")
Notice of General Meeting
Huddled Group plc (AIM:HUD), the circular economy e-commerce group announces that, further to the announcement on 10 February 2026, a notice of general meeting (the "GM") will be posted to shareholders today and will be available shortly on the Company's website:
Investor Information - Huddled Group plc
.
The GM will be held at Token House, 11-12 Tokenhouse Yard, London, EC2R 7AS on 11 March 2026 at 2 p.m.
Background to and reason for the GM
On 10 February 2026 the Company announced (RNS no. 3258S) that it had raised gross funds of approximately £740,000 via direct subscription and a retail offer to strengthen the Group's stock and working capital position across its existing brands, as well as to provide additional working capital for expansion into new channels to market. The Company issued and allotted the Issued Subscription Shares and the WRAP Retail Offer Shares on 12 February 2026. The issue and allotment of the Issued Subscription Shares and the WRAP Retail Offer Shares substantially exhausted the Company's authorities granted at the August 2025 General Meeting and, as a consequence, it has insufficient authorities to issue the Subscription Shares. The Company proposes to hold a General Meeting to request shareholders to provide the required authorities to enable the Subscription Shares to be issued and to refresh the authorities that were taken at the August 2025 General Meeting that have been utilised to satisfy the issue and allotment of the Issued Subscription Shares and the WRAP Retail Offer Shares.
This announcement should be read in conjunction with the full notice of GM sent to shareholders today. Capitalised terms used but not defined in this announcement have the meanings given to them in that document.
Enquiries:
